name: libaprutil1-ldap
title: libaprutil1-ldap
summary: Apache Portable Runtime Utility Library - LDAP Driver
description:
Apache Portable Runtime Utility Library - LDAP Driver
APR is Apache's Portable Runtime Library, designed to be a support library
that provides a predictable and consistent interface to underlying
platform-specific implementations.
.
APR Util is a utilities library implemented on top of apr, providing database
access, xml parsing, and other useful functionality.
.
This package contains the LDAP driver.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libaprutil1-ldap because Apache Portable Runtime Utility Library - LDAP Driver.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libaprutil1-ldap as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libaprutil1-ldap with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libaprutil1-ldap --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
